author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Plan: Implement batched broadcast matmul following PyTorch semantics. For inputs with ndim >= 3, broadcast leading dimensions per NumPy rules, flatten into (B, M, K) @ (B, K, N) batched mm, then reshape output. Handle all PyTorch matmul cases: 1D@1D (dot), 2D@1D (mv), 1D@2D (vm), 2D@2D (mm), and >=3D with broadcast. The key reference is torch.matmul docs.
